title: Jedi shuttle (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jedi shuttle''' could refer to one of the following vehicles used by the [[Jedi]]:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Eta-class shuttle|''Eta''-class shuttle]]'''
*The '''[[T-6 shuttle]]'''
*The '''[[Jedi shuttle (High Republic Era)|Jedi shuttle]] model''' used during the [[High Republic Era]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '[[Jedi shuttlebus/Legends|''Jedi shuttlebus''']] used during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]
*The '''[[T-6 shuttle/Legends|T-6 shuttle]]''', also known as the "Jedi ambassador shuttle"
*The '''[[Eta-class shuttle/Legends|''Eta''-class shuttle]]''', also known as the "Jedi ambassadorial shuttle"
*The '''[[J-1 shuttle]]''' used by the [[New Jedi Order]]

{{Disambig}}
